---
title: "About Blog & Author"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/oleh-nevidomskyi-391110234/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/neviol

---

I am starting this blog to share my thoughts and journey with ML.
